payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the newer, current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is superseded, so it should not be surfaced as the active fact.
citations: input:Explain why recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman and filtered mem_old because it is superseded.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory about Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded and should not be treated as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt refers to Sam and Goldman in a recall-debug context, but no stable entity identifier is provided.

payload.intent: Explain a recall result for Sam from Goldman, including why the newer memory was returned and the older one was filtered.

memory_cards.statement: The recall result for Sam from Goldman should prefer mem_new as the active memory because mem_old is superseded.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered due to supersession.

repair_options: Keep mem_new as the current memory and mark mem_old as superseded.
If mem_old must remain accessible, store it only as historical context, not as current state.

raw_text: {"intent":"Explain a recall result for Sam from Goldman, including why the newer memory was returned and the older one was filtered.","decision":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory about Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded and should not be treated as current.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current_memory","statement":"The recall result for Sam from Goldman should prefer mem_new as the active memory because mem_old is superseded.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation/source"},{"name":"mem_new","type":"memory","role":"returned memory"},{"name":"mem_old","type":"memory","role":"filtered memory"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_new","predicate":"supersedes","object":"mem_old"},{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"is_superseded_by","object":"mem_new"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"associated_with","object":"Goldman"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolve_to_existing","entity_id":null,"reason":"The prompt refers to Sam and Goldman in a recall-debug context, but no stable entity identifier is provided."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the newer, current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is superseded, so it should not be surfaced as the active fact.","citations":["fixture:debug_explain_recall_sam","input:Explain why recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman and filtered mem_old because it is superseded."],"repair_options":["Keep mem_new as the current memory and mark mem_old as superseded.","If mem_old must remain accessible, store it only as historical context, not as current state."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained why mem_new was selected.","Explained why mem_old was filtered due to supersession.","Avoided presenting mem_old as current."]}}
